ST-LINK SN  : 066BFF514852898767094734
ST-LINK FW  : V3J11M3
Board       : NUCLEO-L476RG
Device name : STM32L47xxx/L48xxx

HardFault Analyzer
------------------
Status: HardFault detected

Faulty PC      : 0x080005FE
NVIC position  : -1
Fault type     : BusFault (escalated)

Configurable Fault Status Register (CFSR) : 0x00000400
    BusFault Status Register (BFSR):
        - IMPRECISERR: Imprecise data access bus fault
        - BFAR not valid for this fault

Hard Fault Status Register (HFSR) : 0x40000000
    - FORCED: Forced HardFault

System Control Block (SCB):
    MMFAR : 0xE000ED34
    BFAR  : 0xE000ED38
    SHCSR : 0x00020000
